content:
Fashion Inspiration: Gold & Black

I’ve always loved the combination of black and gold together! It looks so classy and fun no matter what the occasion is. I put together this super cute look of items I totally love and wish I could have! The purse from Target is currently on sale, so there’s a very good chance I WILL in fact grab that while before it’s gone!

My triangle earrings from Etsy are the perfect start to a great black and gold look! The pants are super cute too (though probably too skinny for me), and have gold zippered hardware on the sides that you can’t see in this picture. Be sure to check out each of the items below for more photos and to see where you can purchase them yourselves!

Biker Jacket: Topshop

Stripe Top: Svpply

Slim Fit Pants: H&M

Audrey Brooke Kate Gladiator Sandals: DSW

Melie Hobo Handbag: Target

Maybelline Lacquer: Target

Triangle Earrings: Katie Crafts

What color combos do you adore? Which item is your fave?
